name: power-platform
description: Power Platform specialist team — 11 agents (incl. power-platform-tester, power-bi-engineer) and 18 skills, with strong ALM/git coverage for solutions, flows, and PBIP. A house-opinions hook flags 8 §3/§4 violations; the knowledge bank carries production decision trees (PA-flow recovery, Dataverse token-acquisition, PCF React surface, PBI deploy/refresh, custom-connector build-path, PBIR Enhanced infinite-spinner / resourcePackages + version.json + prototypeQuery breaking-change) plus a real-engagement scenarios bank. Bundles the community pbix-mcp server (d0nk3yhm/pbix-mcp, MIT) for Power BI .pbix/.pbit read/write/DAX-eval (requires `pip install pbix-mcp`), and documents (does not bundle) the official Microsoft Dataverse MCP as the recommended consumer-configured path for live Dataverse read/query/write from Claude — with its admin-consent + billing prerequisites and an evaluate-first note for community Power Automate flow MCPs (CLAUDE.md §9a). Extends ravenclaude-core.
